title: Add short sound effects to all games

requirements.text: Create a custom useSoundEffects hook that generates and plays three short sound effects using the Web Audio API (no external files needed): a soft click/tap sound on every interactive button press, a cheerful success chime on correct answers, and a low buzz/error sound on wrong answers. The hook should expose play functions: playClick(), playSuccess(), playError().

quotes: Har click par — ek halka sa click/tap sound
Sahi jawab par — cheerful success sound

acceptanceCriteria: useSoundEffects hook is created at frontend/src/hooks/useSoundEffects.ts
playClick() produces a short, soft tap sound
playSuccess() produces a short, cheerful success chime
playError() produces a short buzz/error sound
All sounds are generated programmatically via Web Audio API — no audio files required
Hook handles cases where AudioContext is not available gracefully (no crash)

requirements.text: Integrate sound effects into all Section A game pages: CardMatchingGame, MemoryTestGame, PatternMemoryGame, SequenceMemoryGame, SlidingPuzzleGame, StroopEffectGame, and SpeedTypingGame. Call playClick() on every button/tile interaction, playSuccess() on correct answers or level completion, and playError() on wrong answers or game-over states.

quotes: Saare game mein sound add karo
Section A aur Section B dono mein kaam karega

acceptanceCriteria: CardMatchingGame plays click on card flip, success on match found, error on mismatch
MemoryTestGame plays click on input submission, success on correct recall, error on wrong recall
PatternMemoryGame plays click on cell toggle, success on correct pattern, error on incorrect pattern
SequenceMemoryGame plays click on sequence item tap, success on correct sequence, error on wrong sequence
SlidingPuzzleGame plays click on tile move, success on puzzle completion
StroopEffectGame plays click on color button, success on correct color selection, error on wrong color selection
SpeedTypingGame plays success on game completion with good accuracy, error on game over with low accuracy

requirements.text: Integrate sound effects into all Section B game pages: MissingLetterGame, WordScrambleGame, and FillInTheBlanksGame. Call playClick() on every button press or input submission, playSuccess() on correct answers, and playError() on wrong answers.

quotes: Saare game mein sound add karo
Section A aur Section B dono mein kaam karega

acceptanceCriteria: MissingLetterGame plays click on submit/check button, success on correct letter, error on wrong letter
WordScrambleGame plays click on submit, success on correct unscramble, error on wrong guess
FillInTheBlanksGame plays click on submit/check, success on correct answer, error on wrong answer
Show Answer button in MissingLetterGame plays a neutral click sound (not success/error)

constraints: Use Web Audio API only — no external audio files or CDN-hosted sounds
Sound effects must be short (under 500ms) so they do not interfere with gameplay
Do not modify any files in frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, useActor.ts, main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
